heroHeadline: Gaza Ceasefire 'On the Brink' as Hamas Disarmament Deadline Expires
heroSubtitle: The deadliest attack on Jewish people since the Holocaust — assault timeline, hostage crisis resolved Jan 2026, intelligence failures, and IDF response. The Gaza ceasefire is described as on the brink of collapse as the Hamas disarmament deadline expires, with deal collapse risk rising.
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Israel Police, UN OCHA, Israeli government, Reuters, AP, Haaretz, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are official Israeli counts; Hamas-theater figures are separately noted and contested. All 251 hostages accounted for as of January 26, 2026. Cumulative conflict dead (Oct 7, 2023 – Mar 25, 2026): 72,265 Palestinians per OCHA/Gaza MoH.
